subcodes.first_line: O My Fruit! Verily the Divine Tree desireth to exalt thee through its sovereignty, to draw thee nigh through its bounty and its hosts, and to cause thee to hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ثمرتی ان السدره ارادت ان ترفعک بسلطانها و تقربک بجودها و جنودها و تسمعک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @consolation and comfort
